question: Assam state ki state ID identify karo, aur phir us state ID se associated saare district names ki list nikaalo, district name ke hisaab se alphabetically sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT WHERE STATE_ID IN (SELECT STATE_ID FROM DIM_STATE WHERE STATE_NAME = 'Assam') ORDER BY DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
ORDER BY d.district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
ORDER BY d.district_name;

FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name = 'Assam'
GROUP BY dim_district.district_name;
raw_output:

FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name = 'Assam'
GROUP BY dim_district.district_name;

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state ke saare district names list karo, unhe district name ke hisaab se group aur alphabetically order karke dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_district.district_name FROM dim_state JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY dim_district.district_name ORDER BY dim_district.district_name;
raw_output: SELECT dim_district.district_name FROM dim_state JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY dim_district.district_name ORDER BY dim_district.district_name;

question: Andhra Pradesh aur Arunachal Pradesh states ke liye, har state name aur unke total district IDs ka count list karo, basharte ki us state ke district IDs ka count kam se kam ek ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T2.STATE_NAME = 'Arunachal Pradesh' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) >= 1
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, COUNT(dim_district.district_id) AS total_district_ids
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh' OR dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Arunachal Pradesh'
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name
HAVING COUNT(dim_district.district_id) >= 1;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, COUNT(dim_district.district_id) AS total_district_ids
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh' OR dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Arunachal Pradesh'
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name
HAVING COUNT(dim_district.district_id) >= 1;

question: Un districts ke naam list karo jo 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state mein hain aur jinka district ID count zero se zyada hai, aur top 5 results dikhao district IDs ke count ke descending order mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
GROUP BY d.district_name
HAVING COUNT(d.district_id) > 0
ORDER BY COUNT(d.district_id) DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
GROUP BY d.district_name
HAVING COUNT(d.district_id) > 0
ORDER BY COUNT(d.district_id) DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' naam ke district ke liye, district name aur sub-district IDs ka total count list karo, lekin sirf tabhi agar wo count ek se zyada ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 1
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_district.district_name, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id
WHERE dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'North And Middle Andaman'
GROUP BY dim_district.district_id, dim_district.district_name
HAVING COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) > 1;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_district.district_name, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id
WHERE dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'North And Middle Andaman'
GROUP BY dim_district.district_id, dim_district.district_name
HAVING COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) > 1;

question: Andhra Pradesh state ke liye, har district name aur maternity and child welfare centres ka total count list karo, total count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo, aur sirf top 5 districts dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T1.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name, SUM(f.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total_count
FROM dim_state s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN fact_maternity_child_care f ON sd.sub_district_id = f.sub_district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY d.district_name
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name, SUM(f.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total_count
FROM dim_state s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN fact_maternity_child_care f ON sd.sub_district_id = f.sub_district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY d.district_name
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: Un states ke district names aur unke sub-district names ka count dikhao jinka state ID 1 ya 2 hai, aur district ID 1 se 3 ke beech mein hai; sirf wahi districts include karo jinka kam se kam ek sub-district ID ho, aur top 5 results ko sub-district names ke count ke hisaab se descending order mein show karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID IN (1, 2) AND T2.DISTRICT_ID BETWEEN 1 AND 3 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_district.district_name, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count FROM dim_district JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id WHERE dim_district.state_id IN (1, 2) AND dim_district.district_id BETWEEN 1 AND 3 GROUP BY dim_district.district_id, dim_district.district_name HAVING COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) >= 1 ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC LIMIT 5;
raw_output: SELECT dim_district.district_name, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count FROM dim_district JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id WHERE dim_district.state_id IN (1, 2) AND dim_district.district_id BETWEEN 1 AND 3 GROUP BY dim_district.district_id, dim_district.district_name HAVING COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) >= 1 ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC LIMIT 5;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 3. Pred count: 3.

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', aur 'South Andamans' districts ke liye district names aur sub-district IDs ka count dikhao. Data ko district name se group karo, sub-district IDs ke count ke basis par descending order mein sort karo, aur sirf top 5 results display karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_district.district_name, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count FROM dim_district JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id WHERE dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'North And Middle Andaman' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'West Godavari' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'Nicobars' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'Kurnool' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'South Andamans' GROUP BY dim_district.district_name ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC LIMIT 5;
raw_output: SELECT dim_district.district_name, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count FROM dim_district JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id WHERE dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'North And Middle Andaman' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'West Godavari' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'Nicobars' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'Kurnool' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'South Andamans' GROUP BY dim_district.district_name ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Saare sub-districts ke liye sub-district name, district name, aur state name ki list dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID;
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_state.state_name FROM dim_sub_district JOIN dim_district ON dim_sub_district.district_id = dim_district.district_id JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id;
raw_output: SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_state.state_name FROM dim_sub_district JOIN dim_district ON dim_sub_district.district_id = dim_district.district_id JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id;

question: Har state ID ke liye, uska state ID aur usse jude sub-district names ka total count provide karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_ID, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.state_id, COUNT(dsd.sub_district_name) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_state ds
JOIN dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
GROUP BY ds.state_id
ORDER BY ds.state_id;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.state_id, COUNT(dsd.sub_district_name) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_state ds
JOIN dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
GROUP BY ds.state_id
ORDER BY ds.state_id;

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan scheduled tribes rural population zero se zyada hai aur scheduled castes rural population exactly zero hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION > 0.000 AND T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION = 0.000
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name
FROM dim_sub_district
JOIN fact_population ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_population.sub_district_id
WHERE fact_population.scheduled_tribes_rural_population > 0
  AND fact_population.scheduled_castes_rural_population = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name
FROM dim_sub_district
JOIN fact_population ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_population.sub_district_id
WHERE fact_population.scheduled_tribes_rural_population > 0
  AND fact_population.scheduled_castes_rural_population = 0;

question: Un sub-district names aur total scheduled tribes rural population ki list dikhao jahan scheduled castes rural population exactly 0.000 ho, sirf wahi sub-districts include karna jinki total scheduled tribes rural population 0 se zyada ho, aur results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order kar do.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION = '0.000' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population
FROM dim_sub_district ds
JOIN fact_population fp ON ds.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
WHERE fp.scheduled_castes_rural_population = 0.000
  AND fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population > 0.000
ORDER BY ds.sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population
FROM dim_sub_district ds
JOIN fact_population fp ON ds.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
WHERE fp.scheduled_castes_rural_population = 0.000
  AND fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population > 0.000
ORDER BY ds.sub_district_name;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 1456. Pred count: 3939.

question: 'West Godavari' district ke har ek sub-district ka naam aur unki total rural population list karo, aur results ko total rural population ke descending order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'West Godavari' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, fact_population.rural_population
FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id
JOIN fact_population ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_population.sub_district_id
WHERE dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'West Godavari'
ORDER BY fact_population.rural_population DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, fact_population.rural_population
FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id
JOIN fact_population ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_population.sub_district_id
WHERE dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'West Godavari'
ORDER BY fact_population.rural_population DESC;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 27. Pred count: 38.

question: Aise sub-districts jahan rural scheduled castes population 0.000 hai, unka sub-district name aur rural scheduled tribes population ka total sum list karein, basharte ye sum 20 se zyada ho, aur results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically sort karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION = '0.000' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) > 20 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, SUM(fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) AS total_scheduled_tribes_rural_population
FROM dim_sub_district ds
JOIN fact_population fp ON ds.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
WHERE fp.scheduled_castes_rural_population = 0
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_id, ds.sub_district_name
HAVING SUM(fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) > 20
ORDER BY ds.sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, SUM(fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) AS total_scheduled_tribes_rural_population
FROM dim_sub_district ds
JOIN fact_population fp ON ds.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
WHERE fp.scheduled_castes_rural_population = 0
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_id, ds.sub_district_name
HAVING SUM(fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) > 20
ORDER BY ds.sub_district_name;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 1320. Pred count: 1350.

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke har ek sub-district ke names aur unki total rural population list karo, aur results ko total rural population ke descending order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, SUM(fp.rural_population) AS total_rural_population
FROM dim_district dd
JOIN dim_sub_district ds ON dd.district_id = ds.district_id
JOIN fact_population fp ON ds.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
WHERE dd.district_name ILIKE 'North And Middle Andaman'
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_name
ORDER BY total_rural_population DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, SUM(fp.rural_population) AS total_rural_population
FROM dim_district dd
JOIN dim_sub_district ds ON dd.district_id = ds.district_id
JOIN fact_population fp ON ds.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
WHERE dd.district_name ILIKE 'North And Middle Andaman'
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_name
ORDER BY total_rural_population DESC;

question: 'Assam' state ke saare district names ki list dikhao, unhe district name ke hisaab se group aur alphabetically order karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
GROUP BY d.district_name
ORDER BY d.district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
GROUP BY d.district_name
ORDER BY d.district_name;

JOIN dim_district dd ON sds.district_id = dd.district_id
JOIN dim_state ds ON dd.state_id = ds.state_id
WHERE ds.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
ORDER BY ds.state_name;

SELECT sds.sub_district_name, dd.district_name, ds.state_name
FROM dim_sub_district sds
JOIN dim_district dd ON sds.district_id = dd.district_id
JOIN dim_state ds ON dd.state_id = ds.state_id
WHERE ds.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
ORDER BY ds.state_name;

question: Har ek state name aur usse linked sub-district IDs ka total count list karo, state name ke hisaab se group karke aur highest se lowest count ke order mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC

FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name
ORDER BY total_sub_district_count DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, COUNT(DISTINCT dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS total_sub_district_count
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name
ORDER BY total_sub_district_count DESC;

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' aur 'Assam' states ke liye har state name aur unke total sub-district names ka count dikhao, state name se group karke aur sub-districts ke count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME IN ('Andaman And Nicobar Islands', 'Assam') GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.state_name, COUNT(dsd.sub_district_id) AS total_sub_districts
FROM dim_state ds
JOIN dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
WHERE ds.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR ds.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
GROUP BY ds.state_name
ORDER BY total_sub_districts DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.state_name, COUNT(dsd.sub_district_id) AS total_sub_districts
FROM dim_state ds
JOIN dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
WHERE ds.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR ds.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
GROUP BY ds.state_name
ORDER BY total_sub_districts DESC;

question: Un sub-district names aur unke corresponding district names ki list dikhao jahan homeopathic dispensaries ka number zero se zyada ho ya ayurvedic dispensaries ka number zero se zyada ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES > 0.000 OR T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY > 0.000
predicted_sql:
SELECT s.sub_district_name, d.district_name
FROM dim_sub_district s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN fact_healthcare_facilities h ON s.sub_district_id = h.sub_district_id
WHERE h.number_of_homeopathic_dispensaries > 0 OR h.number_of_ayurvedic_dispensary > 0;
raw_output:

FROM dim_sub_district s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN fact_healthcare_facilities h ON s.sub_district_id = h.sub_district_id
WHERE h.number_of_homeopathic_dispensaries > 0 OR h.number_of_ayurvedic_dispensary > 0;

question: India ke top 5 districts ke district names aur total number of child welfare centres list karo, child welfare centres ke sum ke descending order mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T5 ON T4.COUNTRY_ID = T5.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T5.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_district.district_name, SUM(fact_maternity_child_care.number_of_child_welfare_centres) AS total_child_welfare_centres FROM dim_country JOIN dim_state ON dim_country.country_id = dim_state.country_id JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id JOIN fact_maternity_child_care ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_maternity_child_care.sub_district_id WHERE dim_country.country_name ILIKE 'India' GROUP BY dim_district.district_id, dim_district.district_name ORDER BY total_child_welfare_centres DESC LIMIT 5;
raw_output: SELECT dim_district.district_name, SUM(fact_maternity_child_care.number_of_child_welfare_centres) AS total_child_welfare_centres FROM dim_country JOIN dim_state ON dim_country.country_id = dim_state.country_id JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id JOIN fact_maternity_child_care ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_maternity_child_care.sub_district_id WHERE dim_country.country_name ILIKE 'India' GROUP BY dim_district.district_id, dim_district.district_name ORDER BY total_child_welfare_centres DESC LIMIT 5;

question: State ID 1 ke liye, saare district names list karo unki total rural population aur total scheduled tribes rural population ke saath, lekin sirf un sub-districts ko consider karna jahan rural population 500 se zyada hai, aur results ko total rural population ke hisaab se descending order mein sort kar dena.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION), SUM(T3.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID = 1 AND T3.RURAL_POPULATION > 500 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name, SUM(fp.rural_population) AS total_rural_population, SUM(fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) AS total_scheduled_tribes_rural_population
FROM dim_state s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN fact_population fp ON sd.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
WHERE s.state_id = 1 AND fp.rural_population > 500
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.district_name
ORDER BY total_rural_population DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name, SUM(fp.rural_population) AS total_rural_population, SUM(fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) AS total_scheduled_tribes_rural_population
FROM dim_state s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN fact_population fp ON sd.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
WHERE s.state_id = 1 AND fp.rural_population > 500
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.district_name
ORDER BY total_rural_population DESC;

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', aur 'Nicobars' districts ke liye district names, total rural population, aur total scheduled tribes rural population ki list dikhao, jise district name se group kiya gaya ho aur total rural population ke hisaab se descending order mein sort kiya gaya ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION), SUM(T3.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC;
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_district.district_name, SUM(fact_population.rural_population) AS total_rural_population, SUM(fact_population.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) AS total_scheduled_tribes_rural_population FROM dim_district JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id JOIN fact_population ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_population.sub_district_id WHERE dim_district.district_name IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars') GROUP BY dim_district.district_name ORDER BY total_rural_population DESC;
raw_output: SELECT dim_district.district_name, SUM(fact_population.rural_population) AS total_rural_population, SUM(fact_population.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) AS total_scheduled_tribes_rural_population FROM dim_district JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id JOIN fact_population ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_population.sub_district_id WHERE dim_district.district_name IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars') GROUP BY dim_district.district_name ORDER BY total_rural_population DESC;
